query:
INSERT INTO products (company, name, category, description, features, riskLevel, minPremium, maxPremium, targetAudience, competitorFlag) VALUES 
('WealthBridge Financial Group', 'WealthBridge IUL Accumulator', 'iul', 'Indexed Universal Life policy designed for maximum cash value accumulation with downside protection. Features uncapped S&P 500 index strategy with 0% floor and participation rates up to 100%.', '["0% floor protection","Uncapped S&P 500 strategy","Tax-free policy loans","Flexible premium payments","Living benefits rider","Chronic illness rider"]', 'moderate', 500, 100000, 'High-income earners seeking tax-advantaged growth, business owners, individuals wanting death benefit with cash accumulation', false),
('WealthBridge Financial Group', 'WealthBridge IUL Protector', 'iul', 'Indexed Universal Life policy focused on maximum death benefit protection with competitive cash value growth. Ideal for estate planning and income replacement needs.', '["Guaranteed death benefit","Multiple index strategies","No-lapse guarantee rider","Accelerated death benefit","Waiver of premium option"]', 'low', 300, 50000, 'Families needing income replacement, estate planning for high-net-worth individuals, business succession planning', false),
('WealthBridge Financial Group', 'WealthBridge Premium Finance Solution', 'premium_finance', 'Leveraged life insurance strategy for high-net-worth clients. Finance large premium payments using third-party lending while maintaining liquidity and securing substantial death benefits.', '["Third-party premium financing","Competitive loan rates","Collateral optimization","Exit strategy planning","Annual review process","Multiple carrier options"]', 'high', 100000, 5000000, 'Net worth $5M+, business owners with significant assets, estate planning needs exceeding $3M death benefit', false),
('WealthBridge Financial Group', 'WealthBridge Executive Bonus Plan (162)', 'whole_life', 'Section 162 executive bonus arrangement using life insurance to provide tax-deductible bonuses to key employees. Employer pays premiums as compensation; employee owns the policy.', '["Tax-deductible to employer","Employee-owned policy","Vesting schedule options","Golden handcuff provisions","Portable benefit","Simple administration"]', 'moderate', 25000, 500000, 'Businesses retaining key executives, companies seeking tax-deductible benefit plans', false),
('WealthBridge Financial Group', 'WealthBridge Key Person Insurance', 'term_life', 'Life insurance protecting businesses against the financial impact of losing a key employee or owner. Proceeds help cover lost revenue, recruitment costs, and business continuity.', '["Business-owned policy","Tax-free death benefit","Flexible coverage amounts","Term or permanent options","Buy-sell agreement funding"]', 'low', 5000, 200000, 'Small to mid-size businesses, companies with key revenue-generating employees, partnerships and LLCs', false),
('WealthBridge Financial Group', 'WealthBridge Retirement Income Maximizer', 'iul', 'Comprehensive retirement planning strategy combining IUL cash value accumulation with systematic distribution planning. Designed to provide tax-free retirement income.', '["Tax-free policy loans for income","No contribution limits","No required minimum distributions","Market downside protection","Legacy planning component","Long-term care benefits"]', 'moderate', 12000, 250000, 'Individuals maxing out 401(k), high earners seeking additional tax-advantaged savings, pre-retirees', false),
('WealthBridge Financial Group', 'WealthBridge Charitable Legacy Plan', 'whole_life', 'Life insurance strategy designed to maximize charitable giving while providing estate tax benefits. Combines wealth replacement trust with charitable remainder trust.', '["Charitable income tax deduction","Estate tax reduction","Wealth replacement for heirs","Lifetime income stream","Legacy to chosen charities"]', 'moderate', 50000, 1000000, 'Philanthropically-minded high-net-worth individuals, those with appreciated assets, estate tax planning needs', false),
('WealthBridge Financial Group', 'WealthBridge Disability Income Protection', 'disability', 'Individual disability insurance providing income replacement if unable to work due to illness or injury. Own-occupation definition protects specialized professionals.', '["Own-occupation definition","Non-cancelable guaranteed renewable","Cost of living adjustment","Future increase option","Partial disability benefits","Recovery benefit"]', 'low', 2000, 50000, 'Medical professionals, attorneys and executives, high-income earners, business owners', false);
command:
